situations.condition: Target NOT in Line of Sight
actions: Patrol Move toward position that grants LoS to target
If has Guided Fire/Smart/Indirect Fire: Shoot instead
Seek cover en route if possible

situations.condition: Target in LoS, more than 8" away
actions: Cautious Move to reduce distance (seek cover, try to get behind target's AoV)

situations.condition: Target in LoS, 8" or less away
actions: Then: Patrol Move to cover OR Shoot again

special_rules: AI elements do NOT reduce stats from damage — only fill Damage Bar
AI does not need Guard to react — any AI with Action Token within 12" can react once/turn
AI always uses Strike in Close Combat
C3-4 Walkers/Vehicles with CC upgrades always attempt Charge when in range
Fixed-Wing aircraft always Patrol Move (never Cautious)
